extra_commands: echo '===== BUILD INTEGRITY =====' && cd /var/www/qrbanner && (ls -la --time-style=+%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M .next/BUILD_ID .next/server/pages/_error.js 2>&1) && echo 'pages_error_exists='$(test -f .next/server/pages/_error.js && echo yes || echo no) && echo 'next_mtime='$(date -r .next '+%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M' 2>/dev/null)
echo '===== ERROR LOG last 30 with date =====' && tail -n 30 ~/.pm2/logs/qrbanner-error.log 2>&1
